pillar_metadata.name: Harm
pillar_metadata.description: Necessary disruption that forces evolution or signals failure.

harm_accumulation.formula: h_new = h_old + max(0, incoming_damage - Resistance - Integrity)
harm_accumulation.impact: Applies state disruption; can force mutation or unit termination.

moral_objective.impact: Governance prioritizing the reduction of systemic damage.

catastrophic_buildup.result: Systemic failure; the unit can no longer adapt to incoming disruption.

victim_loop.result: Transformation paralysis; the unit focuses on damage signals without the persistence to change.
